---
name: RFC proposal (early-stage discussion)
about: Float an idea before writing a full RFC
title: "[RFC-idea] "
labels: ["rfc-idea"]
assignees: []
---

<!--
Use this template to float an idea before writing a full RFC. If the idea
lands, you (or someone) convert it into a proper RFC PR using
`0000-template.md` and link back to this issue.

If you already have a full proposal, open a PR instead of an issue.
-->

## Problem

<!-- What is the pain point? Who feels it? Why now? -->

## Sketch of a solution

<!-- One or two paragraphs. You do not need full reference-level detail yet. -->

## Affected surfaces

<!-- Tick all that apply. -->

- [ ] `tokencube/zero-protocol` wire format / canonical JSON / signing
- [ ] `tokencube/zeroski` Rust kernel semantics
- [ ] Capability strings / scope composition
- [ ] `tokencube/zero-sdk-ts` or other SDK API
- [ ] Governance / maintainers / licensing
- [ ] Cross-project convention (documentation, test fixtures)

## Does this need an RFC?

<!--
Yes if: breaking change, new MUST clause, new capability string,
cross-project convention, governance change.

No if: bug fix, documentation improvement, additive example, performance
improvement with no observable change.

Unsure? File the RFC — a closed RFC with a clear rejection reason is still
valuable history.
-->

## Prior art / references

<!-- Existing RFCs, external specs, papers, prior discussion. -->
